description.zh: 系统设计、服务边界、高并发 API 与遗留系统演进。
description.en: System design, service boundaries, high-throughput APIs, and pragmatic legacy evolution.

description.zh: 长期主导业务后端、后台系统与工程抽象设计。
description.en: Led business backends, admin systems, and service abstractions for years.

description.zh: 擅长拆解复杂业务，设计可演进的系统边界。
description.en: Strong at turning complex business flows into evolvable system boundaries.

description.zh: 围绕性能、缓存与一致性做过大量生产实践。
description.en: Deep production experience around performance, caching, and data consistency.

description.zh: 熟悉第三方系统集成、接口治理与异常排查。
description.en: Experienced in third-party integrations, API governance, and issue tracing.

description.zh: 将可靠交付、可观测性与清晰的基础设施实践融入日常研发。
description.en: Reliable delivery, observability, and infrastructure that stays understandable.

description.zh: 持续推动容器化与自动化发布落地到日常研发。
description.en: Drove containerized workflows and automated delivery into daily development.

description.zh: 熟悉 Pages、缓存、边缘能力和站点接入配置。
description.en: Hands-on with Pages, caching, edge capabilities, and site delivery setup.

description.zh: 具备线上部署、扩缩容与服务运行维护经验。
description.en: Practical experience with deployment, scaling, and service operations.

description.zh: 关注权限、输入边界和应用层安全基线。
description.en: Focused on authorization, input boundaries, and application security baselines.

description.zh: 以业务目标为起点，协同团队交付可衡量、可持续的产品结果。
description.en: Turning business goals into measurable, sustainable product outcomes with teams.

description.zh: 能独立构建前台展示与后台管理类界面。
description.en: Comfortable building polished frontends and admin interfaces independently.

description.zh: 长期深耕品牌电商、会员体系与交易链路。
description.en: Deep domain experience in brand commerce, membership, and transaction flows.

description.zh: 擅长跨职能协作、推进交付节奏与技术决策。
description.en: Strong in cross-functional leadership, delivery pacing, and technical decisions.

description.zh: 开始把 AI 能力引入研发提效和内容生产流程。
description.en: Actively introducing AI into engineering efficiency and content workflows.

description.zh: Enthusiastically promote fully tested niches before resource maximizing alignments. Continually.
description.en: Enthusiastically promote fully tested niches before resource maximizing alignments. Continually.

description.zh: 理解商品结构化建模与内容治理的核心问题。
description.en: Understands the core problems of product modeling and content governance.

description.zh: 能从编辑体验和发布流程角度设计内容系统。
description.en: Designs content systems from both authoring experience and publishing flow.

description.zh: 关注下单路径、促销逻辑和结算体验细节。
description.en: Focused on cart flow, promotion logic, and checkout experience details.
